opportunities.thesis: Explicit bug bounties remain on high-traffic repositories; buyers pay to resolve critical UI bugs with dollar rewards. Few public substitutes exist for this direct fix.

selected_execution.reason: This opportunity has clear verified monetary reward, explicit buyer intent, and public channel fit; publishing a validation brief on GitHub Pages enables transparent, low-cost market testing and signals capability to both the buyer and other bounty issuers.
